# UX Specification — Google Login Feature
**Artifact ID:** ART-UX-003  
**Workflow Run:** WR-001  
**Generated by:** UI/UX Agent  
**Version:** 1.0

---

## 1. UX Principles Applied

- **Minimal friction:** Google button phải nổi bật và dễ thấy ngay khi vào trang
- **Safety net:** Mọi lỗi đều có recovery path — không bao giờ để user bị stuck
- **Non-destructive:** Adding Google login không thay đổi bất kỳ UI element hiện có
- **Feedback loop:** User luôn biết hệ thống đang làm gì (loading, success, error)

---

## 2. Interaction Specifications

### 2.1 Google Login Button
| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Location | Login page, dưới separator "or", phía dưới email/password form |
| Size | Full-width, 44px height (touch-friendly) |
| Icon | Official Google "G" logo, color version, 20x20px |
| Label | "Sign in with Google" |
| data-testid | `google-login-btn` |

**States:**
| State | Visual | Behavior |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Default | White bg, gray border, Google icon | Clickable |
| Hover | bg-gray-50 | Cursor pointer |
| Loading | Spinner replaces icon, text "Connecting to Google..." | Disabled, form disabled |
| Disabled | opacity-70, cursor-not-allowed | Not clickable |

### 2.2 Error Handling
| Error Type | Message | Recovery |
|-----------|---------|---------|
| Auth failed | "Google login failed. Please try again." | Button re-enabled |
| Network error | "Connection error. Check your internet and retry." | Retry button |
| Account not linked | "This Google account is not linked. Would you like to link it?" | Modal with options |
| User cancelled | (no message) | Return to default state |

### 2.3 Loading States
| Phase | Indicator | Duration |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| OAuth initiation | Button spinner | Until popup |
| Token verification | Full overlay spinner | Backend call duration |
| Redirect | Blank flash | < 200ms |

---

## 3. Navigation Flow

```
/login ──[Google success]──▶ /dashboard
/login ──[Google fail]──────▶ /login (error state)
/login ──[Cancel popup]─────▶ /login (default state)
/profile/settings ──[Link success]──▶ /profile/settings (linked state)
```

---

## 4. Accessibility Requirements

- Google button must have `aria-label="Sign in with Google"`
- Error messages must have `role="alert"` for screen readers
- Loading state must have `aria-busy="true"` on the form
- All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible
- Tab order: Email → Password → Sign In → (divider) → Google button

---

## 5. Responsive Design

| Breakpoint | Behavior |
|-----------|---------|
| Mobile (< 640px) | Full-width button, stacked layout |
| Tablet (640-1024px) | Card centered, max-width 420px |
| Desktop (> 1024px) | Card centered, max-width 420px |

---

## 6. Animation & Transitions

| Element | Animation | Duration |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Error banner appear | slide-down + fade-in | 200ms |
| Loading spinner | rotate | continuous |
| Success redirect | fade-out | 150ms |
| Error banner dismiss | fade-out | 150ms |
